title: ATR FTIR Spectroscopy of Aqueous Cell Cultures
author: Emrulla Spahiu
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdidi4a6

steps.title: Arrange the temperature of the working environment to 25 °C
steps.instruction: Arrange the temperature of the working environment to 25 °C

steps.title: Clean the ATR crystal using a...
steps.instruction: Clean the ATR crystal using a cellulose wipe and water-ethanol-water sequence. Scratching the crystal surface must be avoided. ATR FTIR (Spectroscope, Perkin Elmer Inc., Norwalk, CT, USA, X)

steps.title: Select “Scan and Instrument Setup” and...
steps.instruction: Select “Scan and Instrument Setup” and input sample name, scan range (650-4000 cm -1 ), scan number (128), and spectral resolution (2 cm -1 ). This step needs optimization for specific sample being used. Spectrum One Perkin Elmer

steps.title: Scan the backgroung spectrum to overcome...
steps.instruction: Scan the backgroung spectrum to overcome the probable atmospheric interference that can be triggered by H 2 O and CO 2 molecules present in the air, subtracted automatically by the software.

steps.title: Additionally, record PBS as sample (subtract...
steps.instruction: Additionally, record PBS as sample (subtract this manually from each spectrum) This eliminates interference of PBS and flattens the water band located around 2125 cm -1

steps.title: Put 1 µL cell samples and...
steps.instruction: Put 1 µL cell samples and let to dry with a mild N 2 flux for 00:05:00 . This allows cells to settle on the crystal.

steps.title: Scan the sample
steps.instruction: Scan the sample. Process takes about 00:07:00 to finish. As the scanning process goes on, one must be sure that the quality check sign is everytime green.

steps.title: Scan each sample under the same...
steps.instruction: Scan each sample under the same conditions in three independent scans (the average constitutes a replicate n). Replicates (n=5) are used in data analysis. This minimizes intra-sample variability and eliminates possible variation that might arise from experimental conditions.

steps.title: The avarage of triplicates is taken manually
steps.instruction: The avarage of triplicates is taken manually. Spectrum One Perkin Elmer

steps.title: Import spectra as data file into Unscrambler 11
steps.instruction: Import spectra as data file into Unscrambler 11.0 Camo, NO

steps.title: Define the data sets to 3000-650 cm -1 region
steps.instruction: Define the data sets to 3000-650 cm -1 region.

steps.title: Make the PCA Model
steps.instruction: Make the PCA Model. Define the regions with high variation using the Loadings plots. Check how the replicates are grouping and if there are outliers in Scores plots.

steps.title: Peak labelling can be done automaticaly
steps.instruction: Peak labelling can be done automaticaly. For increased precision we measured manually: Measure the center of weight of each band. Read the frequency. Compare the peaks you obtained, to the literature: Zanyar Movasaghi, Shazza Rehman, and Ihtesham ur Rehman. Fourier Transform Infrared (FTIR) Spectroscopy of Biological Tissues. Applied Spectroscopy Reviews. http://10.1080/05704920701829043 Make an excel file of your peaks and their assignment to the functional groups. For side-peak band assignment, the second derivative spectrum is used.

steps.title: Concentration studies are carried out by...
steps.instruction: Concentration studies are carried out by integrating the curves under the peaks.

steps.title: For conformational alteration studies, bandwidth measurements...
steps.instruction: For conformational alteration studies, bandwidth measurements are done manually using the 75% height of the peaks.
